raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation 'Clean this up' most directly requests sentence- and paragraph-level improvement of grammar, flow, register, and concision.","RX.1":"Any cleanup should preserve uncertainty rather than silently converting tentative or context-dependent claims into stronger ones.","RX.2":"The artifact contains strong theoretical, empirical, and novelty claims, so avoiding inflated wording is an expected cross-cutting responsibility.","RX.3":"The request is broad but still bounded to cleanup, so the projected responsibility should not expand into executing a technical review or rewriting the research contribution.","RX.4":"Because the text concerns research claims about model calibration and optimization, cleanup should avoid increasing the risk of misleading downstream readers.","RX.5":"Edits implied by the delegation should preserve traceability to the original claims, citations, and reported results."}}

rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'Clean this up' most directly requests sentence- and paragraph-level improvement of grammar, flow, register, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: Any cleanup should preserve uncertainty rather than silently converting tentative or context-dependent claims into stronger ones.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact contains strong theoretical, empirical, and novelty claims, so avoiding inflated wording is an expected cross-cutting responsibility.
rationale.RX.3: The request is broad but still bounded to cleanup, so the projected responsibility should not expand into executing a technical review or rewriting the research contribution.
rationale.RX.4: Because the text concerns research claims about model calibration and optimization, cleanup should avoid increasing the risk of misleading downstream readers.
rationale.RX.5: Edits implied by the delegation should preserve traceability to the original claims, citations, and reported results.
